## Summary

<!-- Explain what changed and why. Link related issues, for example: Part of #123. -->

## Validation

<!-- List the commands or manual checks used to validate this change. -->

- [ ] `make check` passes, or I explained why it was not run.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation when needed.
- [ ] I reviewed Bible text provenance, licensing, attribution, and checksums if this changes bundled translation data.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, personal data, or sensitive logs.
